key_insight: HotRelax performs one-shot, end-to-end crystal structure relaxation by learning directly from paired unrelaxed and relaxed structures, eliminating iterative optimization and DFT force labels.
engineering_relevance: This can substantially speed up high-throughput materials screening and make relaxation workflows more compact, scalable, and easier to integrate into downstream property prediction pipelines.
method: Trained on unrelaxed/relaxed structure pairs, not force labels
Single forward pass predicts relaxed structures without post-processing
evidence_signal: Across five datasets covering 3D crystals, 2D layered materials, and catalysts, HotRelax outperformed or matched state-of-the-art end-to-end relaxation models and produced structures close in DFT-relaxed energy.
watch_item: Performance may depend on the diversity and quality of paired relaxation data, so generalization to new chemistries or extreme distortions should be validated carefully.
paper_title: High-order tensor neural network for iteration-free structure relaxation
